allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Contas ativas:', d.get\('activeSocialAccounts','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('whatsapp ok:', 'whatsappNumero' in d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} itens no radar:', [x['title'] for x in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['title']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(items\)} pautas válidas:'\); [print\(f'  ✓ {x[\\"title\\"][:80]}'\) for x in items]")
